content:
# Calculation Of Accuracy

**Summary**: A metric used to determine the concentration of cuttings in the annulus.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] used CCA to ensure that cutting concentrations did not exceed 0.05.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Used to monitor the volume of solids in the wellbore.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Calculated based on flow rate and pipe velocity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Penalty Approach was used to ensure the selected value for CCA is not exceeding 0.05 and more than 0.035. ([[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017, p. 154]])
